name: Bitbucket
description: Git operations, pull requests, and code review via Bitbucket CLI (bkt)
author: Agent Hub

configSchema.label: Default Branch
configSchema.description: The default branch for pull request targets (e.g. main, master, develop)

configSchema.label: Bitbucket Host
configSchema.description: Select Cloud for bitbucket.org or Data Center for self-hosted instances

configSchema.label: Git Author Name
configSchema.description: Override git commit author name. Leave empty to use global git config.

configSchema.label: Git Author Email
configSchema.description: Override git commit author email. Leave empty to use global git config.

name: GitHub
description: Git operations, pull requests, and code review via GitHub CLI
author: Agent Hub

configSchema.label: Default Branch
configSchema.description: The default branch for pull request targets (e.g. main, master, develop)

configSchema.label: GitHub Token
configSchema.description: Personal access token (GH_TOKEN). Leave empty to use gh auth login credentials.

configSchema.label: Git Author Name
configSchema.description: Override git commit author name. Leave empty to use global git config.

configSchema.label: Git Author Email
configSchema.description: Override git commit author email. Leave empty to use global git config.

name: Jira
description: Sync issues, transitions, sprints, and dev tasks with Jira via MCP (mcp-atlassian)
author: Agent Hub

configSchema.label: Jira Project Key
configSchema.description: The Jira project key (e.g. PROJ, ENG, MOBILE)

configSchema.label: Default Issue Type
configSchema.description: Default issue type for created subtasks (e.g. Task, Sub-task, Story)

configSchema.label: Status: In Progress
configSchema.description: Jira transition name to set when work begins

configSchema.label: Status: In Review
configSchema.description: Jira transition name to set when PR is created

configSchema.label: Status: Done
configSchema.description: Jira transition name to set when task completes
